inputs.name: ariaControlsId
inputs.description: propagate aria-controls for accessibility to the native HTML button

inputs.name: ariaDescribedBy
inputs.description: Sets the `aria-describedby` attribute to the element

inputs.name: ariaDisabled
inputs.description: aria-disabled for accessibility to the native HTML button

inputs.name: ariaExpanded
inputs.description: propagate aria-expanded for accessibility to the native HTML button

inputs.name: ariaLabel
inputs.description: Sets the `aria-label` attribute to the element

inputs.name: ariaLabelledBy
inputs.description: Sets the `aria-labelledby` attribute to the element

inputs.name: ariaPressed
inputs.deprecated:
use toggled input property instead
propagate aria-pressed for accessibility to the native HTML button

inputs.name: ariaSelected
inputs.deprecated:
use toggled input property instead
aria-selected for accessibility to the native HTML button

inputs.name: buttonType
inputs.deprecated:
Use `fdType` property.
The buttonType of the button. Types includes
'standard','positive', 'negative', 'attention', 'ghost',
'transparent', 'emphasized','menu'.
Leave empty for default (standard button).

inputs.name: fdType
inputs.description:
The type of the button. Types include:
'standard' | 'positive' | 'negative' | 'attention' | 'half' | 'ghost' | 'transparent' | 'emphasized' | 'menu'.
Leave empty for default (Standard button).
Default value is set to 'standard'

inputs.name: glyph
inputs.description: The icon to include in the button. See the icon page for the list of icons

inputs.name: glyphPosition
inputs.description: Position of glyph related to text

inputs.name: id
inputs.description: Button ID - default value is provided if not set

inputs.name: title
inputs.description: arialabel, tooltip for button, intended to be used when the button only contains an icon

inputs.name: toggled
inputs.description: Whether button is in toggled state

inputs.name: type
inputs.description: Specifies the type to the native HTML button

inputs.name: value
inputs.description: Specifies an initial value to the native HTML button

outputs.name: buttonClicked
outputs.description: Event sent when button is clicked

methods.name: getFdType
methods.description:
Get the current button type.
Implements ButtonModel interface.

methods.name: isDisabled
methods.description:
Get the current disabled state.
Implements ButtonModel interface.

methods.name: markForCheck
methods.description:
No-op method for interface compatibility.
Implements ButtonModel interface.
Signal-based components don't need manual change detection.

methods.name: setDisabled
methods.description:
Programmatically set the disabled state.
Implements ButtonModel interface.
Note: Cannot directly set signal inputs. This method exists for interface compatibility.

methods.name: setFdType
methods.description:
Programmatically set the button type.
Implements ButtonModel interface.
Note: Cannot directly set signal inputs. This method exists for interface compatibility.
